org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.httpclient.CoverallsClient

Packages that use CoverallsClient
Package
Description
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin
Provides the main Maven plugin classes.
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.httpclient
Provides HTTP client related classes to post the coverage data to Coveralls.
